evidence: evidence: PR title: stable fail point test.
evidence: explicitly disables failpoint before second getTimestampWithRetry to make t1>t2 deterministic (store/tikv/store_test.go).

evidence: PR body includes CI race detector trace (WARNING: DATA RACE) involving parser/terror during ddl tests.
evidence: diff switches terror Class().New(...) to Class().Synthesize(...) when rewriting cancelled DDL job error, avoiding the data race (ddl/ddl.go).
files: ddl/ddl.go
evidence: PR title: stabilify the result; makes greedy selectivity stable by sorting nodes (statistics/selectivity.go).
evidence: adds TestSelectivityGreedyAlgo to assert chosen set is stable regardless of input order (statistics/selectivity_test.go).
files: statistics/selectivity.go, statistics/selectivity_test.go
evidence: PR title: unstable order; avoid sorting multiple times in mocktikv TopN executor.

evidence: move sort.Sort(&e.heap.topNSorter) to only run once after exhausting input to avoid unstable intermediate ordering (store/mockstore/mocktikv/executor.go); adds TestIssue15767 (executor/executor_test.go).
files: store/mockstore/mocktikv/executor.go, executor/executor_test.go
evidence: PR title: make TestLoadDataMissingColumn stable.
evidence: avoids comparing full current timestamp string; only checks hour/minute fields to reduce timing flakiness (executor/write_test.go).
files: executor/write_test.go
evidence: PR title: skip plan cache for prepared stmt's cache tests.
evidence: sets PreparedAst.UseCache=false after PrepareStmt so tests are not affected by plan cache state (executor/executor_test.go).
files: executor/executor_test.go
evidence: PR title: tests may fail because of concurrency.
evidence: adds drop table if exists before create in several tests to avoid cross-test interference (expression/integration_test.go).
files: expression/integration_test.go
evidence: PR title: enlarge timeout for test.
evidence: increases time.After from 100ms to 3s to avoid CI timing flakes (ddl/util/syncer_test.go).
files: ddl/util/syncer_test.go
evidence: PR title: exclude random tests when race is enabled.
evidence: moves long random tests into a new file with build tag '!race' so they won't run under race detector (kv/memdb/memdb_norace_test.go, kv/memdb/memdb_test.go).
files: kv/memdb/memdb_norace_test.go, kv/memdb/memdb_test.go
evidence: PR title: make TestTransactionOnAddDropColumn stable.
evidence: increases schema lease from 100ms to 600ms in DDL test suite setup to reduce timing instability (ddl/db_test.go).
files: ddl/db_test.go
evidence: PR body includes a CI race detector trace (WARNING: DATA RACE) around expression.Constant collation info.
evidence: replaces shared globals (One/Zero/Null) with constructors (NewOne/NewZero/NewNull) and adjusts Clone to create fresh constants to avoid shared mutable state (expression/constant.go etc).

evidence: PR title: make test running serially.

evidence: moves prepared plan cache related tests into SerialSuites / serial suites to avoid parallel interference (executor/executor_test.go, executor/explainfor_test.go, expression/integration_test.go, planner/core/prepare_test.go).
files: executor/executor_test.go, executor/explainfor_test.go, expression/integration_test.go, planner/core/prepare_test.go

evidence: PR title: fix DATA RACE caused by changing global logger when testing.
evidence: moves OOM tests into a separate sequential suite and uses a mutex-protected log capturer to avoid races (executor/oomtest/oom_test.go, executor/seqtest/seq_executor_test.go).

evidence: PR title: make TestFromUnixTime stable in different timezone.

evidence: PR body: fix unstable result when select distinct enum/set column.

evidence: deep-copies Enum/Set values (Copy()) and uses Copy() in firstRow aggregation to avoid referencing underlying data; adds TestIssue16854 to assert stable DISTINCT results (types/enum.go, types/set.go, executor/aggfuncs/func_first_row.go, executor/executor_test.go).

evidence: PR title: stable test cases.
